# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

- 200
          request_method:
            - GET
          content_type:
            - application/json
          cache_ttl: 300
          strategy: memory
          memory:
            dictionary_name: kong_db_cache
          cache_control: true
          vary_headers:
            - Accept
            - Accept-Encoding

  # Notification Service
  - name: notification-service
    url: http://notification-service-upstream
    connect_timeout: 10000
    write_timeout: 30000
    read_timeout: 30000
    retries: 2
    routes:
      - name: notification-routes
        paths:
          - /api/v1/notifications
        methods:
          - GET
          - POST
          - PUT
          - DELETE
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
        https_redirect_status_code: 301
      - name: notification-webhooks
        paths:
          - /api/v1/webhooks
        methods:
          - POST
        strip_path: false
        preserve_host: true
        protocols:
          - https
    plugins:
      - name: jwt
        config:
          key_claim_name: iss
          claims_to_verify:
            - exp
          secret_is_base64: false
          run_on_preflight: true
          header_names:
            - Authorization
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 30
          hour: 500
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0
          redis_timeout: 2000
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
          limit_by: consumer

  # Health Check Endpoint (internal)
  - name: gateway-health
    url: http://localhost:8001/status
    routes:
      - name: health-check
        paths:
          - /health
        methods:
          - GET
        strip_path: true
        protocols:
          - http
          - https

# Global plugins applied to all services
plugins:
  # Global correlation ID for request tracing
  - name: correlation-id
    config:
      header_name: X-Request-ID
      generator: uuid#counter
      echo_downstream: true

  # Global logging via HTTP log shipping
  - name: http-log
    config:
      http_endpoint: http://log-collector:9200/kong-logs/_doc
      method: POST
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      content_type: application/json
      retry_count: 3
      flush_timeout: 2
      queue_size: 1000

  # Global file logging
  - name: file-log
    config:
      path: /var/log/kong/access.log
      reopen: true

  # Global CORS configuration
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - "https://app.example.com"
        - "https://admin.example.com"
        - "https://www.example.com"
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
        - HEAD
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-Requested-With
        - Origin
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-ID
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Minute
        - X-RateLimit-Limit-Hour
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining-Hour
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
      preflight_continue: false

  # Global IP restriction (block known malicious IPs)
  - name: ip-restriction
    config:
      deny:
        - 192.168.100.0/24
      status: 403
      message: "Access denied"

  # Bot detection
  - name: bot-detection
    config:
      deny:
        - "scrapy"
        - "wget"
        - "curl"

  # Request termination for deprecated API versions
  - name: request-termination
    route: null
    config:
      status_code: 410
      message: "This API version has been deprecated. Please use /api/v1/"

  # Global response transformer - security headers
  - name: response-transformer
    config:
      add:
        headers:
          - "X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff"
          - "X-Frame-Options: DENY"
          - "X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block"
          - "Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload"
          - "Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
          - "Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'"
          - "Permissions-Policy: geolocation=(), camera=(), microphone=()"
      remove:
        headers:
          - "Server"
          - "X-Powered-By"

  # Global request size limiting
  - name: request-size-limiting
    config:
      allowed_payload_size: 5
      size_unit: megabytes
      require_content_length: false

  # Prometheus metrics for monitoring
  - name: prometheus
    config:
      per_consumer: true
      status_code_metrics: true
      latency_metrics: true
      bandwidth_metrics: true
      upstream_health_metrics: true

  # TCP log for centralized logging (e.g., ELK stack)
  - name: tcp-log
    config:
      host: logstash
      port: 5044
      timeout: 10000
      keepalive: 60000
      tls: false

# Consumer definitions for API key-based authentication
consumers:
  - username: mobile-app
    custom_id: mobile-app-001
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: mobile-app-api-key-production-2024
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: mobile-app-iss
        algorithm: HS256
        secret: "${MOBILE_APP_JWT_SECRET}"
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 300
          hour: 10000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
          limit_by: consumer

  - username: web-frontend
    custom_id: web-frontend-001
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: web-frontend-api-key-production-2024
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: web-frontend-iss
        algorithm: HS256
        secret: "${WEB_FRONTEND_JWT_SECRET}"
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 200
          hour: 8000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
          limit_by: consumer

  - username: admin-dashboard
    custom_id: admin-dashboard-001
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: admin-dashboard-api-key-production-2024
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: admin-dashboard-iss
        algorithm: HS256
        secret: "${ADMIN_DASHBOARD_JWT_SECRET}"
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 500
          hour: 15000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
          limit_by: consumer

  - username: third-party-partner
    custom_id: partner-001
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: partner-api-key-production-2024
    jwt_secrets:
      - key: partner-iss
        algorithm: HS256
        secret: "${PARTNER_JWT_SECRET}"
    plugins:
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          minute: 60
          hour: 2000
          policy: redis
          redis_host: redis
          redis_port: 6379
          redis_database: 0
          fault_tolerant: true
          limit_by: consumer
      - name: acl
        config:
          allow:
            - partner-group
          hide_groups_header: true

# ACL groups
acls:
  - consumer: mobile-app
    group: internal-apps
  - consumer: web-frontend
    group: internal-apps
  - consumer: admin-dashboard
    group: admin-group
  - consumer: admin-dashboard
    group: internal-apps
  - consumer: third-party-partner
    group: partner-group

# Certificate definitions for TLS
certificates:
  - cert: "${SSL_CERT}"
    key: "${SSL_KEY}"
    snis:
      - name: api.example.com
      - name: "*.api.example.com"
